nodes.label: AI as impartial feedback and gap identifier
nodes.label_negative: AI as biased or unreliable feedback source
nodes.grounding_span: AI's presumed impartiality as an inhuman tool to assess any potential weaknesses in my writing

nodes.label: AI as organizational and research assistant
nodes.label_negative: AI as creative substitute for human imagination
nodes.grounding_span: It acts as a search engine/feedback tool

nodes.label: Authorial control and creative ownership
nodes.grounding_span: It's always me. I'm always mindful of being in control

nodes.label: AI as tool for market and business perspective
nodes.grounding_span: AI can help an author think more about the business side of writing

nodes.label: Creative authenticity and human uniqueness
nodes.grounding_span: The uniqueness of human creativity, flawed and unpredictable as it is, must stay intact

nodes.label: Efficiency and organization in creative work
nodes.grounding_span: It helps fill gaps one might not immediately think of

nodes.label: Critical reflection and objectivity
nodes.grounding_span: It's helped me distance myself from my emotional bond to the work as it encourages additional reflection

nodes.label: Positive embrace of AI as impartial feedback tool
nodes.grounding_span: I'm trying to use AI's presumed impartiality as an inhuman tool to assess any potential weaknesses

nodes.label: Negative stance against AI as creative substitute
nodes.grounding_span: I'm personally very much against it being used as a creative substitute

nodes.label: Ambivalent view on AI's role in simplifying tedious aspects
nodes.grounding_span: I think it can simplify the aspects of the work that may seem tedious or boring, and take away the creative spark

nodes.label: Reflective deliberation — weighs suggestions and complements with research
nodes.grounding_span: I weigh every suggestion the AI makes, sometimes complement it with additional research via a search engine and reflect on it a lot

nodes.label: Principled boundary-setting — maintains clear ethical limits on AI use
nodes.grounding_span: My pride as a writer and my personal ethics don't allow me to use AI to create content instead of my own brain and imagination
